category_sources: source_facts.description says Gossip is a desktop client for Nostr; official GitHub README says Gossip is a desktop client for NOSTR.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Gossip; source_facts.name is gossip.
docs_sources: Official repository contains a docs directory; official README links to Installation and Usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mikedilger/gossip, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official GitHub About topics include chat, socialmedia, and nostr; README describes Nostr as an open social media protocol.
